title: Review: vault backend put refactor, test guards, footgun doc
notes: Confidence: 10% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) not having run the integration tests against a live Vault — the empty-object P0 was found by reading; there may be other Vault KV v2 edge cases (e.g. deleted secret version still returning 404, or metadata-only paths) that vaultrs surfaces differently than expected. (2) SecretUri::parse behavior for unusual inputs not read in this review. Would raise confidence if: integration test suite passes on a live Vault dev server with the empty-object P0 fix applied.
